ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "overall" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the player */,
  "potential" INTEGER /* Potential rating of the player */,
  "club" TEXT /* Club the player belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the player */,
  "wage" INTEGER /* Wage of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player */,
  "international_reputation" INTEGER /* International reputation of the player */,
  "weak_foot" INTEGER /* Weak foot of the player */,
  "skill_moves" INTEGER /* Skill moves of the player */,
  "work_rate" TEXT /* Work rate of the player */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "joined" TEXT /* Date the player joined the club */,
  "loaned_from" TEXT /* Club the player is loaned from */,
  "contract_valid_until" TEXT /* Contract valid until */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "agent" TEXT /* Agent of the player */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the player's data */,
  "injury_status" INTEGER /* Injury status of the player */,
  "suspension_status" INTEGER /* Suspension status of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Links to social media profiles */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the team's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff (e.g., coach, scout, trainer) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the staff belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the staff member */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the staff member was hired */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the staff member's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the injury belongs to */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "estimated_recovery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of recovery */,
  "actual_recovery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of recovery */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  "medical_report" TEXT /* Link to a detailed medical report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the suspension belongs to */,
  "suspension_type" TEXT /* Type of suspension */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date the suspension occurred */,
  "suspension_length" INTEGER /* Length of the suspension in matches */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the suspension */,
  "actual_return_date" TEXT /* Actual return date after the suspension */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the transfer belongs to */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred from */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player transferred to */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer occurred */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Amount paid for the transfer */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the new contract in years */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "shots_on_goal" INTEGER /* Number of shots on goal */,
  "successful_passes" INTEGER /* Number of successful passes */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received */,
  "substitutions" INTEGER /* Number of times substituted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
